ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_affiliations" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media affiliation */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media organization */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media organization's website */,
  "media_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the media organization */,
  "media_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the media organization */,
  "media_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the media organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete in the athletes table */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media affiliation */,
  "first_place" TEXT /* Athletes who placed first with details */,
  "second_place" TEXT /* Athletes who placed second with details */,
  "third_place" TEXT /* Athletes who placed third with details */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance entry */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., Basketball, Football) */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NBA, NFL) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the athlete based on placements */,
  "improvement_rating" REAL /* Rating based on the athlete's performance improvement over the season */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_affiliations ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ranking" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement position (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the placement */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance entry in the athlete_performance table */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_ranking_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES athlete_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Team the athlete is affiliated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the athlete in the sport */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the athlete was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the athlete was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the athlete attended */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)
